suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep the web-feature-worker skill explicit that monolithic dashboard persisted-state regressions may be verified with targeted post-implementation regression tests when failing-test-first is impractical, rather than implying every such fix must start from a red test.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Original feature diff 573ba22 adds lib/history-preferences.test.ts alongside the new helper/UI code, and the fix handoff for worker session 99e4e5c-902a-4f57-95dd-c7065e8cf38d explicitly suggests clarifying storage-backed persisted-state guidance in .factory/skills/web-feature-worker/SKILL.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update startup guidance so Windows-host workers skip direct .factory/init.sh execution when no POSIX shell is available, instead of first attempting a doomed invocation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Transcript skeleton for fdab3f34-1277-4ab4-a2fb-d7d299eb75c5 includes an Execute call that tries to run C:\Users\bendc\Documents\GitHub\Leagueback-WEBAPP\.factory\init.sh via Python; the handoff skillFeedback marks this as a deviation and suggests a Windows-safe skip. AGENTS.md Testing & Validation Guidance says not to attempt .factory/init.sh directly on this Windows host unless a compatible POSIX shell is available.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker discovered an exec-wrapper-specific failure mode for the documented Windows stop helper because PowerShell dollar-sign variables were mangled, but the shared state still documents only the primary stop command. A wrapper-safe fallback cleanup command should be documented for future workers using this host.
